title: ATR-Scaled Trailing Stop Replacement for Fixed-Percentage Stops
summary: Replace fixed-percentage bracket stop-losses with ATR-scaled trailing stops that widen in volatile markets and tighten in calm ones. Research from practitioner sources (ForexTester, QuantifiedStrategies 2024–2025) consistently recommends stop-loss at 2–3x ATR and trailing take-profit at 1–1.5x ATR for trend-following strategies. This builds directly on the already-spec'd ATR Volatility-Targeting Position Size Layer and creates a coherent volatility-aware execution stack.
expected_impact: ATR-based trailing stops adapt to current volatility, avoiding premature stops in high-volatility regimes and keeping stops tight in low-volatility regimes; backtesting practitioner evidence suggests 1x–2x ATR trailing stops reduce premature exits by 15–25% vs fixed-percentage stops on trending instruments
